targets.rawSql: SELECT window_start as time, open, high, low, close, volume FROM `stock_analytics.ohlcv_1min` WHERE symbol = '${symbol}' AND DATE(window_start) = CURRENT_DATE() ORDER BY window_start
SELECT window_start as time, volume FROM `stock_analytics.ohlcv_1min` WHERE symbol = '${symbol}' AND DATE(window_start) = CURRENT_DATE() ORDER BY window_start
SELECT symbol, severity, anomaly_type, price, price_zscore, volume_zscore, detected_at FROM `stock_analytics.anomalies` WHERE DATE(detected_at) = CURRENT_DATE() ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT symbol, COUNT(*) as count FROM `stock_analytics.anomalies` WHERE DATE(detected_at) = CURRENT_DATE() GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT price_zscore FROM `stock_analytics.anomalies` WHERE DATE(detected_at) >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
SELECT trade_date as time, symbol, daily_return_pct as value FROM `stock_analytics.fct_daily_market` WHERE trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY trade_date

list.name: symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM `stock_analytics.ohlcv_1min` WHERE DATE(window_start) = CURRENT_DATE() ORDER BY symbol
